title: [FIRRTL][GCT] Generate Binds for Grand Central Interfaces

features.name: systemverilog interface definition with logic member
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface definition with an internal logic signal member

features.name: bind interface instance to parent module with wildcard connection
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that connects an interface instance to a parent module using wildcard (.*) port connections

features.name: bind module instance to parent module with named port connections
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that connects a module instance to a parent module using explicit named port connections
